However, Section 18 (b) will be applicable only for such time as Dr. Neeru Chadha continues to be a Member of the International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea. 2. This Notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F. No. UI/155/9/2017] SANJAY VERMA, Jt.
